implemented_fixes.summary: Retired the unused external short-data provider from active source registry, data-pull rule sheet, materializer policy, provider preflight policy, bounded source smoke policy, raw landing schema definitions, source-family priorities, semantic taxonomy, strategy grammar, active prompt surface, active pipeline manual, source coverage matrix builder, and focused tests.
evidence: configs/v2/source_registry.json active source count is 9
configs/v2/production_data_pull_rule_sheet.json source_registry_source_count is 9
schemas/v2/raw_landing.schema.json no longer declares retired provider raw landing definitions
active-surface grep for retired provider terms returned no hits in AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, configs/v2, schemas/v2, scripts, src, selected active tests, selected active plan, and active pipeline manual

implemented_fixes.summary: Updated the VBT tool 002 provider/data-type mapper policy and positive fixture from 12 active sources to the current 9 active sources.
evidence: scripts/v2_validate_v7_2_5_vbt_tool_002_provider_data_type_mapper.py --repo-corpus --summary-only passed with source_registry_source_count 9
scripts/v2_validate_v7_2_5_tool_real_data_smoke.py --summary-only passed
scripts/v2_validate_v7_2_5_vbtpro_top300_import_smoke.py --repo-corpus --summary-only passed
scripts/v2_validate_v7_2_5_vbtpro_other300_import_smoke.py --repo-corpus --summary-only passed

implemented_fixes.summary: Replaced a full tokenized private VectorBT Pro docs URL in a negative fixture with a redacted placeholder. This is classified as private docs URL persistence hygiene, not a secret-value leak.
evidence: Exact scan for the prior private-docs URL fragment returned no hits outside excluded source-input/vector-index areas
VectorBT Pro MCP still emits full private docs URLs in tool output, so repo files should keep using credentialed_vectorbtpro_api_docs_endpoint rather than persisted private docs URLs

implemented_fixes.summary: Repo-index status now compares tracked paths, missing indexed tracked paths, dirty tracked file hashes, and build-head metadata before returning a clean status.
evidence: scripts/v2_repo_index.py --status --summary-only --no-auto-refresh now returns status=stale in the dirty worktree instead of false-green passed
focused repo-index freshness pytest passed

implemented_fixes.summary: Script-import architecture query status now detects stale HEAD metadata, missing tracked script/test paths, and dirty tracked file hash changes.
evidence: scripts/v2_query_script_import_architecture_index.py --summary-only now exits stale in the current stale-index state
tracked missing path queries return stale issue details instead of a clean zero-record pass

implemented_fixes.summary: Summary-only validator flows now default to read-only for the touched validators, with durable writes gated by explicit write flags.
evidence: data estate output route, text event alignment, timeframe registry, source, and data quality masking validators were updated
summary-only validation commands left tracked receipts, checkpoints, reports, and manifests untouched in focused checks

implemented_fixes.summary: Added raw landing fixture manifest coverage for remaining Massive minute flatfile, REST technical indicator, and live websocket quote lanes, and made the source validator avoid blocking existing non-source support fixtures merely because they are not source-ingestion manifest entries.
evidence: scripts/v2_validate_sources.py passes for pit_price_corporate_actions_and_history_store, pit_fundamentals_filings_news_and_short_float, pit_feature_store_availability_gate_and_asof_joins, and source_intelligence_outcome_labels_and_scorecards under --summary-only
all 9 active Massive source IDs are covered by raw landing lineage and promotion gate results

findings.summary: The active repo index reports stale=false while missing tracked files and while dirty tracked files have hashes that differ from indexed hashes.
evidence: Before fix, scripts/v2_repo_index.py --status --summary-only --no-auto-refresh returned status=passed and stale=false
After fix, the same command returns status=stale with tracked_file_missing, tracked_file_hash_changed, and index_head_mismatch freshness issues in the current dirty/stale-index state
scripts/v2_repo_index.py --path scripts/v2_validate_research_difficulty_semantics.py --compact --no-auto-refresh returned status=missing

git ls-files includes scripts/v2_validate_research_difficulty_semantics.py, tests/v2/research_factory/test_research_difficulty_semantics.py, and tmp/reports/production/research_difficulty_semantics_audit_20260513.json
manifests/v2/repo_index.sqlite files table has 0 rows for those tracked paths
findings.impact: Authority lookups and low-token exact-path queries can silently miss committed research validators, tests, and reports.
findings.recommended_fix: Implemented: repo-index freshness compares tracked file path sets, tracked file hashes, indexed tracked paths, and build-head metadata before returning clean status.

findings.summary: After retiring the unused provider, source validation still blocks three Massive lanes because fixture/raw-landing lineage coverage is missing.
evidence: Before fix, scripts/v2_validate_sources.py --slice pit_price_corporate_actions_and_history_store --summary-only --dry-run returned status=failed

After fix, source validation passes for pit_price_corporate_actions_and_history_store, pit_fundamentals_filings_news_and_short_float, pit_feature_store_availability_gate_and_asof_joins, and source_intelligence_outcome_labels_and_scorecards
source_count=9 and all 9 active source IDs are covered
Added fixture manifest coverage for massive_flatfiles_stocks_minute, massive_rest_technical_indicators, and massive_websocket_quotes_live
findings.impact: Live and historical data pulls are easier than before, but minute flatfiles, technical indicators, and live websocket quotes still cannot be promoted through the current source gate.
findings.recommended_fix: Implemented: added bounded fixture/raw-landing lineage coverage for the three remaining Massive lanes and retained fixture-before-live promotion semantics.

findings.summary: VBT real-data smoke and top300/other300 import smokes failed after source retirement because vbt_tool_002 still expected 12 active source-registry entries.
evidence: Initial scripts/v2_validate_v7_2_5_tool_real_data_smoke.py --summary-only failed with VBT_TOOL_002_SOURCE_REGISTRY_COUNT_MISMATCH
After updating configs/v2/v7_2_5_vbt_tool_002_provider_data_type_mapper_policy.json and the positive fixture to 9, real-data smoke and both import smokes passed
findings.impact: This would have blocked VBT642 queue validation despite the provider retirement being intentional.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep VBT tool policy expected denominators generated from source_registry or checked by a focused denominator consistency test.

findings.summary: The script import architecture index reports passed even though its build metadata points at an older commit and it misses current tracked script/test surfaces.
evidence: Current HEAD is db5a48b467511ead81da06476587739fc22e223a
manifests/v2/script_import_architecture_index.sqlite build_metadata head is 05d6259c302ec58309b750497810815542781c60
files table has 0 rows for scripts/v2_validate_research_difficulty_semantics.py and tests/v2/research_factory/test_research_difficulty_semantics.py
Before fix, scripts/v2_query_script_import_architecture_index.py --summary-only returned status=passed and issue_count=0
After fix, the same command returns status=stale with path-set, dirty-hash, and index-head freshness issues in the current stale-index state
findings.impact: Import-risk and script-surface queries can miss recently added validators while still presenting a clean status.
findings.recommended_fix: Implemented: query/status now adds HEAD/path-set/hash freshness checks and fails stale indexes before returning clean summaries.

findings.summary: Some validation/audit flows are not read-only under --summary-only.
evidence: Before fix, scripts/v2_validate_data_estate_output_routes.py --summary-only rewrote manifests/v2/data_estate_no_delete_cleanup_candidate_manifest.json and manifests/v2/data_estate_writer_route_audit.json during audit
scripts/v2_validate_text_event_alignment.py and scripts/validate_v2_timeframe_registry.py now require explicit report-write flags for durable reports
scripts/v2_validate_sources.py and scripts/v2_validate_data_quality_masking.py now treat --summary-only as dry-run/read-only unless --write is passed
findings.impact: Read-only validation and pytest/audit flows can dirty tracked artifacts or repo reports, masking real worktree changes.
findings.recommended_fix: Implemented for audited validators: --summary-only is read-only by default, with durable writes gated by --write or --write-report.

findings.summary: The output schema index passes but has weak explicit schema identity coverage and missing provenance metadata.
evidence: manifests/v2/output_schema_index.json status=passed
output_count=933, explicit_schema_identity_count=41, inferred_schema_identity_count=514, missing_schema_identity_count=378
upstream_manifest_path, upstream_manifest_hash, and created_at_utc are null
findings.impact: Research outputs are indexed broadly, but promotion and reproducibility checks still depend heavily on inferred or missing schema identity.
findings.recommended_fix: Add explicit schema IDs and upstream manifest hashes to high-value durable outputs first, then make missing identity a warning budget or gate by output family.

findings.summary: The private research artifact index passes but carries thousands of warning ledger rows and lacks clean reconciliation for newer research surfaces.
evidence: scripts/v2_query_private_research_artifact_index.py --summary-only returned status=passed, artifact_count=3107, issue_count=0, issue_ledger_count=5715, unreconciled_count=66

Issue ledger includes 5645 PRIVATE_RESEARCH_INDEX_OUTPUT_ROUTE_ABSOLUTE_REVIEW warnings, 66 PRIVATE_RESEARCH_INDEX_REPO_INDEX_RECONCILIATION_PENDING warnings, and 4 PRIVATE_RESEARCH_INDEX_CONFIG_VARIABLE_SCAN_TRUNCATED warnings
322 distinct paths have absolute-output-route review warnings
findings.impact: High warning volume can hide actionable route mistakes and makes index quality harder to assess during research audits.
findings.recommended_fix: Split expected absolute historical outputs from actionable route warnings, reconcile new research surfaces into the repo index, and add build metadata/freshness facts to the private index.

findings.summary: The private research VBT sweep index passes while one expected metrics summary output is missing.
evidence: scripts/v2_query_private_research_vbt_sweep_result_index.py --summary-only returned status=passed, run_count=4, metric_row_count=6
manifests/v2/private_research_vbt_sweep_result_index.sqlite output_files has one file_exists=0 row
Missing output key: metrics_summary for run private_research_vbt_sweep__smoke-random10__20260512T115933Z
findings.impact: Sweep history can look green while a run-scoped summary artifact is absent.
findings.recommended_fix: Either regenerate the missing run metrics summary or encode missing optional historical summaries as explicit non-blocking expected gaps.

findings.summary: The plan-note index correctly detects staleness but most indexed plan/note records lack metadata.
evidence: scripts/v2_plan_note_index.py --status --compact --no-auto-refresh returned status=stale after active doc/plan edits
metadata_missing_count=281 out of plan_count=322
stale reasons were the edited pipeline manual and future slice prompt structure
findings.impact: Staleness detection is better than repo-index behavior, but metadata sparsity weakens routing and authority classification.
findings.recommended_fix: Add required metadata to active and high-use historical plan/note records, then enforce metadata for new durable plans/reports.

findings.summary: VectorBT Pro MCP search output may include full private docs URLs even when the repo policy prefers credentialed_vectorbtpro_api_docs_endpoint in persisted files.
evidence: mcp__vectorbtpro__.resolve_refnames resolved vbt.Portfolio, vbt.Data, and vbt.IF successfully
mcp__vectorbtpro__.search returned private-docs links in tool output
The repository fixture was redacted; the MCP output itself was not persisted into repo files
findings.impact: Agents can accidentally persist full private docs URLs while copying MCP evidence into repo artifacts.
findings.recommended_fix: Add a report/receipt linter rule that rewrites private docs URLs to credentialed_vectorbtpro_api_docs_endpoint before durable persistence.

validation_results.summary: 300 resolved imports, 0 failed imports, real_data_smoke_status=passed, topology_smoke_status=passed
300 resolved imports, 0 failed imports, real_data_smoke_status=passed, topology_smoke_status=passed
9 of 9 active sources pass fixture/raw-lineage promotion coverage; summary-only ran read-only
Adjacent source-data slices pass with all 9 active sources covered and no missing fixture files

next_actions.action: Reduce private research artifact warning noise by separating accepted historical absolute routes from actionable current route warnings.
Increase explicit schema identity on high-value durable outputs and attach upstream manifest provenance to output_schema_index.
Regenerate or explicitly classify the missing private VBT sweep metrics summary artifact.
Add metadata to active/high-use plan-note records, then enforce metadata for new durable plans/reports.
Add persisted-artifact lint coverage for private docs URLs emitted by MCP tool output.
